Sanju Samson on picking CSK

"There were two or three options at that time. But honestly, CSK, Mahi bhai's influence, the franchise itself, and my friends there, especially Ruturaj, meant I had great connections. Based on what I had heard about CSK from other players, I felt that this franchise was my type. [Jiostar]

2077961992095281415.full_text:
INDIAN BATTERS CAN’T FACE SHORT BALLS?

Ravi Bopara said, “It’s almost like every time an Indian batsman falls to the short ball, a signal is sent to the dressing room, and they get worried about the short ball. You get a lot of indifference in pace and bounce on English wickets. It just looks like India are a little bit worried about the short ball at the moment.” [NDTV]

🚨 BREAKING NEWS 🚨

🚨SPECIAL FAREWELL CEREMONY PLANNED FOR ROHIT SHARMA🚨

The BCCI is likely to organize a special farewell ceremony for Rohit Sharma at the iconic Lord’s cricket ground as a tribute to the Hitman’s incredible contribution to Indian cricket. the 3rd ODI between India and England at Lord’s could become an emotional evening for Indian cricket fans. In an emotional development, Rohit Sharma’s parents have also arrived in London ahead of the occasion, adding even more emotion and significance to the ceremony.

🚨BREAKING NEWS🚨

🚨AFTER ROHIT SHARMA, VIRAT KOHLI’S 2027 WORLD CUP PLACE ALSO IN DANGER🚨

According to reports The Indian team management is now seriously considering building a fresh and young team for the upcoming World Cup. After Rohit Sharma’s future came under the scanner, questions are now reportedly being raised over Virat Kohli’s place in the World Cup plans as well.The team management wants to focus on a younger core and is believed to be looking at players who can serve Indian cricket for the next several years. Several young talents are now being closely monitored as India plans a possible transition. [Saurabh Trivedi - Revyaz Sports]
